snippet.title: Jason Murray
snippet.description:
Personal account. Backend engineer in Seattle. I mostly watch and save - Go and distributed systems talks, homelab and Kubernetes stuff, mechanical keyboard builds, and weeknight cooking tutorials. Occasionally post a short clip from a keyboard build.

Not a real creator, just a place to keep my Watch Later sane.

channel.title: Jason Murray
channel.description: Personal viewer account. Go, homelab, Kubernetes, mechanical keyboards, and cooking.
